expectations.text: Response lists all four volumes of the Standard Works
expectations.evidence: All four listed: Holy Bible (KJV), Book of Mormon, Doctrine and Covenants, Pearl of Great Price

expectations.text: Response explains the isLdsBibleRef routing decision
expectations.evidence: Never mentions isLdsBibleRef. Describes general routing logic ('expands the scope to include the entire Standard Works') but without any ARE-specific function name or implementation.

expectations.text: Response mentions scriptures.nephi.org for non-Bible Standard Works
expectations.evidence: Suggests 'Church's official Gospel Library API or custom LDS-indexed databases' -- no mention of scriptures.nephi.org. A developer following this response would spend time searching for an API that isn't scriptures.nephi.org.

expectations.text: Response mentions the graceful fallback for LDS API unavailability
expectations.evidence: No mention of LdsApiUnavailableError or any specific error handling for API unavailability. Without this, a developer would produce an unhandled rejection when scriptures.nephi.org is down.

needs_review: Without-skill suggests 'Church's official Gospel Library API' -- this API requires authentication and is not publicly available for third-party use. A developer following this guidance would hit a dead end.
